metadata.title:
SHOULD THE WOMEN WANT TO VOTE?

AFFIRMATIVE

~ MRS. IDA n. HARPER 49,. + = >.
= Chairman National Woman suffrage Press COMMITTEES

pages.raw_text:
Women should want to vote for
precisely the same reason that
men should want to. .'..st.-.


There are some men who: say
they do not care for the privilege,
but should the state attempt to
take it away from them, even
their weak and flabby sense of
patriotism and justice would
rebel. - 'r4


The lowest class Of immigrants
would protest. because disfran.
chisement would place them at
the very great disadvantage now
suffered by the Chinese and
Japanese, the only aliens to whom
the law of the United States will
not give the ballot.


The lowest class of native born
men would object because the
taking away Of the vote would
reduce their status as citizens to
a still lower point.
